_note: Annotated registry of all SAP MCP tools. Groups match the prefix domains in sap/sap_mcp.py. Update when tools are added or removed.

groups.kb: Knowledge Base — long-term atoms in Postgres
groups.soil: SOIL Store — structured local records on disk
groups.fork: Forks — worktree isolation and session branching
groups.soul: Soul — tension scan, dream synthesis, pattern recognition
groups.nest: Nest — intake queue for incoming work
groups.mai: MarkdownAI — document rendering and phase execution
groups.code_graph: Code Graph — symbol indexing, impact analysis, walk
groups.app: Apps — SAFE app lifecycle (install, uninstall, status)
groups.voice: Voice — key term extraction for TTS

kb_search.description: Search KB atoms by title/content. Use semantic=true for embedding-based retrieval (nomic-embed). Depth limit 3 before asking user.

kb_get.description: Fetch a single KB atom by ID.

kb_ingest.description: Write a new atom to the KB. Requires title, summary, category, project.

kb_query.description: Structured query against KB atoms with filters.

kb_at.description: Temporal replay — what did the KB know about a query at a specific point in time? Uses bi-temporal edges.

kb_journal.description: Write a journal entry atom (lightweight ingest for session notes).

soil_get.description: Read a record from a SOIL collection by ID.

soil_put.description: Append a record to a SOIL collection. Requires id/_id/b17 field.

soil_update.description: Update an existing SOIL record in-place. Audit-trailed.

soil_search.description: Full-text search within a SOIL collection.

soil_list.description: List records in a SOIL collection with optional filters.

soil_stats.description: Atom count, edge count, edges/atoms ratio for an agent schema.

soil_audit.description: Audit trail for a SOIL record — all versions.

soil_add_edge.description: Add a directed edge between two SOIL records.

soil_edges_for.description: List all edges for a given SOIL record ID.

fleet_status.description: Primary health check — Postgres, SOIL, Ollama, manifests. app_id is YOUR agent name.

fleet_health.description: Detailed health report across all fleet components.

fleet_agents.description: List registered agents and their manifest status.

fleet_blast.description: Broadcast a message to all fleet agents.

fleet_persona.description: Get or set the active persona for an agent.

fleet_base17.description: Base17 identifier registry for fleet components.

agent_create.description: Register a new agent in the fleet.

agent_dispatch.description: Dispatch a task to a specific agent.

agent_dispatch_result.description: Retrieve the result of a dispatched task.

agent_route.description: Route a task to the appropriate agent based on trust tier and availability.

agent_task_submit.description: Queue a shell command for Kart execution (bwrap sandbox, 120s timeout). Returns stdout/stderr.

agent_task_list.description: List pending tasks in the Postgres task queue.

agent_task_status.description: Check status of a submitted task.

fork_create.description: Create a new fork (worktree isolation context) for an initiative.

fork_list.description: List all open forks for an agent.

fork_log.description: Append a log entry to a fork.

fork_merge.description: Close a fork with an outcome note.

skill_load.description: Load a skill by name — returns full skill content.

skill_put.description: Register or update a skill in the skill registry.

mem_check.description: Gate check — validate a memory candidate before writing.

mem_ratify.description: Ratify a memory through the Jeles gate (certainty > 0.95 required).

mem_jeles_register.description: Register a raw JSONL in an agent's schema. Returns BASE 17 ID.

mem_jeles_extract.description: Extract a knowledge atom from a registered JSONL. Certainty must exceed 0.95.

mem_binder_edge.description: Add an edge to the Binder knowledge graph.

mem_binder_file.description: Register a file in the Binder.

index_search.description: Search opus.atoms by title or content. Supports semantic=true.

index_feedback.description: Read feedback entries from the Opus index.

index_feedback_write.description: Write a feedback entry to the Opus index.

index_ingest.description: Ingest a document into the Opus index.

index_journal.description: Write a journal entry to the Opus index.

ledger_read.description: Read FRANK ledger entries. Major decisions and agreements recorded here permanently.

ledger_write.description: Write a FRANK ledger entry. Tamper-evident audit chain — use for ratified decisions.

handoff_latest.description: Read the most recent handoff for an agent. First thing after willow.md at boot.

handoff_rebuild.description: Rebuild the handoff index after writing a new handoff file.

tension_scan.description: Scan KB atoms for semantic tensions or redundancies via nomic-embed + mistral:7b. write_kb=true saves findings as a tension atom.

dream_check.description: Check whether AutoDream synthesis conditions are met.

dream_run.description: Run AutoDream — tension scan → pattern synthesis via mistral:7b → dream KB atom. Call dream_check first unless force=true.

nest_scan.description: Scan the Nest intake queue for pending items.

nest_queue.description: Add an item to the Nest intake queue.

infer_chat.description: Route a chat inference request — local Ollama first, then configured provider fallback.

infer_7b.description: Fast local inference via Ollama 7B model. Check fleet_status before use.

grove_get_history.description: Read message history for a Grove channel. Pull before posting.

grove_send_message.description: Post a message to a Grove channel.

grove_reply.description: Reply to a Grove message thread.

grove_inbox.description: Read the agent's Grove inbox (directed messages).

grove_get_thread.description: Fetch a full Grove message thread by ID.

grove_get_identity.description: Get the identity/persona of a Grove participant.

grove_watch.description: Watch a single Grove channel for new messages.

grove_watch_all.description: Watch all Grove channels — used by grove_monitor for persistent monitoring.

grove_flag.description: Set a flag on a Grove message (needs-reply, starred, urgent, resolved).

grove_unflag.description: Remove a flag from a Grove message.

grove_heartbeat.description: Send a heartbeat to Grove (agent liveness).

grove_bus_send.description: Send a message on the Grove internal bus.

grove_bus_receive.description: Receive messages from the Grove internal bus.

mai_read_file.description: Read and render a MarkdownAI document. Returns ai-format (token-efficient) by default. Use for willow.md and all .md skill files.

mai_get_constraints.description: Extract @constraint blocks from a MarkdownAI document.

mai_get_env.description: Get environment variables exposed to MarkdownAI rendering.

mai_invalidate_cache.description: Invalidate the MarkdownAI render cache for a file.

mai_list_phases.description: List phases defined in a MarkdownAI document.

mai_next_phase.description: Advance to the next phase in a MarkdownAI workflow.

mai_resolve_phase.description: Resolve a named phase from a MarkdownAI document.

code_graph_search.description: Fuzzy symbol search — exact → prefix → contains → camelCase/snake_case token split.

code_graph_index.description: Index a file or directory into the code graph.

code_graph_walk.description: Walk the code graph from a symbol — show callers/callees.

code_graph_explain.description: Explain a symbol in context of the code graph.

code_graph_impact.description: Analyze impact of changing a symbol — what else would break?

code_graph_suggest.description: Suggest related symbols based on code graph proximity.

app_install.description: Install a SAFE app from monorepo or standalone repo URL. Registers manifest and wires .mcp.json.

app_uninstall.description: Uninstall a SAFE app and remove its manifest.

app_status.description: Check install status of a SAFE app — manifest, code path, .mcp.json validity.

voice_keyterms.description: Extract key terms from text for TTS emphasis or summarization.

env_check.description: Check environment variables and their current values.

diagnostic_summary.description: Full diagnostic summary — env, services, manifests, recent errors.

session_review.description: Review the current session state and recent activity.
